verbatim_quote: Similarly, similarly if the language model uses a particular circuit to predict diagnoses and the circuit uses features correlated with sycophancy, then a self consistent language model should be able to verbalize that the circuit I use for confirming your diagnosis uses features correlated with sycophancy.
